private_label_products.core_problem: People struggle to fall asleep due to racing thoughts, light sensitivity, and lack of physical relaxation cues. Traditional sleep masks are too light and don't provide grounding pressure.
private_label_products.target_audience: Adults 25-55 with sleep issues: shift workers, insomniacs, anxiety sufferers, frequent travelers, meditation practitioners
marketing_angles: Anxiety & Stress Relief: 'Like a weighted blanket for your eyes - activates pressure point therapy'
Travel Essential: 'Block out plane lights and hotel brightness - sleep anywhere'
Meditation Aid: 'Deepen your practice with gentle pressure and complete darkness'
Shift Worker Solution: 'Sleep during daylight with blackout + grounding weight'
Digital Detox: 'Replace screen time with pressure therapy before bed'
private_label_products.why_evergreen: Sleep problems are universal and increasing due to screen time and stress. Not seasonal - people need sleep year-round. Not trend-dependent - based on established weighted blanket science.
differentiation: Cooling gel layer on skin side
Contoured 3D design that doesn't touch eyelashes
bundle_upsell: Sleep bundle: Weighted mask + earplugs + sleep spray
Travel kit: Mask + neck pillow + compression socks
Meditation set: Mask + guided meditation access
Cooling gel inserts (separate purchase)
Silk pillowcase (premium sleep bundle)

private_label_products.core_problem: Cable clutter everywhere - desk, bag, car, bedside. Cables tangle, get lost, look messy. People have 5+ cables per person but no good way to store them.
private_label_products.target_audience: Remote workers, digital nomads, students, minimalists, organization enthusiasts, anyone with multiple devices
marketing_angles: Desk Minimalism: 'The invisible cable solution - clean aesthetic workspace'
Travel Organization: 'No more tangled cables in your bag - grab and go'
Car Essential: 'Keep charging cables tidy and accessible while driving'
Nightstand Solution: 'Bedside cable management that looks good'
Shared Space: 'Family charging station that doesn't look like a mess'
private_label_products.why_evergreen: Device ownership keeps increasing. Cable management is a permanent need. Works with any cable type (USB-C, Lightning, etc.). Not dependent on tech trends.
bundle_upsell: Home office bundle: 6 organizers + cable ties + desk mat
Travel kit: 2 organizers + cable pouch + adapter
Family pack: 12 organizers in mixed colors
Premium metal version for executives
Under-desk mounting brackets

specs.materials: ABS plastic, silicone grip, adhesive backing

private_label_products.core_problem: Fresh produce spoils too fast - Singapore throws away 20% of food. People buy vegetables but they wilt/rot before use. No good storage solution that actually extends freshness.
private_label_products.target_audience: Health-conscious families, meal preppers, busy professionals, eco-conscious consumers, bulk shoppers, home cooks
marketing_angles: Food Waste Warrior: 'Save $500/year on groceries - keep produce fresh 3x longer'
Meal Prep Essential: 'Prep Sunday, eat fresh all week'
Eco Living: 'Reduce food waste, reduce carbon footprint'
Busy Professional: 'Shop once, eat fresh all week - no daily grocery runs'
Family Health: 'Kids eat more veggies when they're crisp and fresh'
private_label_products.why_evergreen: Everyone eats. Food waste is a permanent problem. Not seasonal - produce storage needed year-round. Growing eco-consciousness drives demand.
differentiation: Size variety: herb box, berry box, leafy greens, root vegetables
bundle_upsell: Complete kitchen set: 8 containers + labels + guide
Herb garden kit: Herb saver + seeds + scissors
Meal prep bundle: Containers + portion plates + recipe book
Replacement filter packets (recurring revenue)

specs.materials: BPA-free plastic, silicone seal, activated carbon

Pre-cut common sizes + custom cut template

Shoe shape designed to fill toe box completely
